title: rootless: allow cgroupfs manager on cgroups v2
body:
if there are no resources specified, make sure the OCI resources block
is empty so that the OCI runtime won't complain.

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

Does this need to be in RC1? Should I recreate the PR/tag?

> Does this need to be in RC1? Should I recreate the PR/tag?

yes please, this is the issue we were discussing earlier that existing containers where manager=cgorupfs will not work otherwise.

It was reported for crun as well: https://github.com/containers/crun/issues/118
